reviews.comment:
Al lado de la estación de servicio, está el camping para socios. Tiene parrillas, mesas y baños. Excelente opción para pasar el día al aire libre. Los artefactos en buenas condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
Next to the gas station is the members' campground. It has grills, tables, and restrooms. An excellent option for spending the day outdoors. The facilities are in good condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBd0xEZWx3RRAB
